description: ol-not-a-place (issue #156): the runtime's guard for a nested-place assignment target (`count :nums[1] = 3` parses as a `Call` with callee `count` whose argument is itself a `Place`) reconciled to the FULL target surface text (`count :nums[1]`), matching the semantic checker's `not-a-place-nested-and-infix` fixture's `count :nums[1]` case and the same source-slicing rule (`not-a-place-text.ts`). The leading `:nums = [1 2 3]` assignment keeps this fixture focused on `ol-not-a-place` alone, without also tripping `ol-undefined-var` on the `:nums` read.
